design.epias_l1_ai_judgment: Which best describes your AI judgment when deciding if AI-generated designs are review-ready?
design.epias_l1_output_consistency: Which best describes the consistency of your AI-assisted design outputs across a feature?
design.epias_l1_traceability: Which best describes your traceability practice for AI-influenced design decisions?
design.epias_l1_learning_loop: Which best describes your learning loop after critiques on AI-assisted design work?

design.epias_l2_chunking: Which best describes how you chunk design work into bounded AI asks?
design.epias_l2_integration: Which best describes how you integrate AI-generated designs into your design system?
design.epias_l2_qa_rigor: Which best describes your QA and design review rigor for AI-generated design deliverables?
design.epias_l2_reusability: Which best describes your reusable AI prompts, examples, and assets practice?
design.epias_l3_workflow_repeatability: Which best describes your AI-assisted design workflow repeatability across projects?

design.epias_l3_failure_handling: Which best describes your AI-related failure handling and recovery practice in product design workflows?
design.epias_l3_tooling_operationalization: Which best describes your AI design tooling and workflow persistence setup across sessions?
design.epias_l3_decision_traceability: Which best describes your practice for documenting AI versus human design decisions in reviews?
design.epias_l4_quality_evals: Which best describes your automated quality evaluation for AI-generated designs?
design.epias_l4_unattended_recovery: Which best describes your practice for handling failures in unattended AI design runs?

design.epias_l4_decision_traceability: Which best describes your AI design decision logging and reviewability practice?

design.epias_l5_exception_triage: Which best describes your exception handling and escalation practice in AI-driven design workflows?
design.epias_l5_quality_gates: Which best describes your trust calibration and release readiness for AI-generated design deliverables?
